---
title: "Safe & Maintainable AI Apps in Python"
subtitle: "SciPy 2026 Tutorial"
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.hero}
![](slides/images/me-square.png){.hero-photo}

### Carson Sievert · Posit

A 4-hour hands-on tutorial on building safe, verifiable, and maintainable AI apps in Python — using **chatlas**, **shinychat**, and **querychat**.
:::

::: {.quick-links}
[Slides](slides/00-welcome.html){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}
[GitHub Repo](https://github.com/cpsievert/scipy26-tutorial){.btn .btn-outline-secondary role="button"}
[Setup Instructions](https://github.com/cpsievert/scipy26-tutorial#install){.btn .btn-outline-secondary role="button"}
:::

## What we'll cover

::: {.cards}
::: {.card}
[[🧭]{.emoji-icon}<br>**Foundations**<br>embrace the good, engineer around the bad · 45 min](slides/01-foundations.html)
:::

::: {.card}
[![](slides/images/chatlas.png)<br>**chatlas**<br>programming with LLMs · 60 min](slides/02-chatlas.html)
:::

::: {.card}
[![](slides/images/shinychat.svg)<br>**shinychat**<br>chatbots made easy · 45 min](slides/03-shinychat.html)
:::

::: {.card}
[![](slides/images/querychat.png)<br>**querychat**<br>self-service analytics case study · 45 min](slides/04-querychat.html)
:::
:::

## Resources

- [chatlas docs](https://posit-dev.github.io/chatlas/)
- [shinychat docs](https://posit-dev.github.io/shinychat/py/)
- [Shiny GenAI chatbots guide](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-chatbots.html)
- [querychat docs](https://posit-dev.github.io/querychat/py/index.html)
